justification: The diff updates Spring to 6.x, Jakarta EE 10, and Java 21 compiler settings, and removes @Autowired in favor of constructor injection, which is good. It also uses pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted(). However, it leaves Hibernate at 4.3.11.Final (incompatible with Jakarta EE 10 and Spring 6), removes hibernate-entitymanager without adding a replacement, and leaves spring-data-jpa at 1.10.6.RELEASE (Spring Boot 1.x era), making the project unbuildable. The diff is incoherent due to these massive version mismatches.
